ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "incumbency" TEXT /* Incumbency status of the candidate (e.g., Incumbent, Challenger) */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the candidate */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., email, phone) for the candidate */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* The URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) of the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., U.S. Senator, U.S. Representative) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the office is located */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., Executive, Legislative) */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term for the office (in years) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate participating in the election */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office being contested */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the election (e.g., Won-General, Lost-General) */,
  "total_money" REAL /* Total amount of money raised by the candidate */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District number (if applicable) */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* The year the election took place */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., Primary, General) */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., Mail-in, In-person) */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate filing the report */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed */,
  "total_receipts" REAL /* Total receipts reported by the candidate */,
  "total_disbursements" REAL /* Total disbursements reported by the candidate */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., Quarterly, Yearly) */,
  "filed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who filed the report */,
  "cash_on_hand" REAL /* Amount of cash on hand at the time of the report */,
  "debts_owed_by" REAL /* Total debts owed by the candidate */,
  "debts_owed_to" REAL /* Total debts owed to the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the finance report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the finance report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_finance_reports_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_finance_reports_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
